project_name: Petrol Grava Services - Immersive Industrial Redesign

design_philosophy.vibe: Industrial Luxury, Heavy Engineering, Cinematic Depth
core_principles: Motion is Material: Animations should feel heavy and mechanical, not floaty.
Density with Breath: High information density in grids, but massive whitespace around sections.
Immersive Navigation: Floating glass headers, smooth scrolling (Lenis), and parallax backgrounds.

usage.h1: font-heading font-bold text-6xl md:text-8xl tracking-tight uppercase leading-[0.9]
usage.h2: font-heading font-bold text-5xl md:text-6xl tracking-tight uppercase
usage.h3: font-heading font-semibold text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-normal uppercase
usage.label: font-accent text-xs uppercase tracking-widest text-primary/80

grid_systems.bento_services: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8 auto-rows-[400px]
grid_systems.stats_row: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-8 border-y border-primary/10 py-12

buttons.primary: bg-petrol-green text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-none uppercase font-heading font-bold tracking-widest hover:bg-petrol-green/90 transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden group
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-petrol-green text-petrol-green px-8 py-4 rounded-none uppercase font-heading font-bold tracking-widest hover:bg-petrol-green hover:text-white transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-petrol-green uppercase font-heading font-bold tracking-widest hover:text-petrol-gold transition-colors duration-200

cards.service_card: group relative h-full w-full overflow-hidden bg-white border border-stone-200 hover:border-petrol-gold/50 transition-all duration-500
cards.feature_card: p-8 bg-stone-100 border-l-4 border-petrol-green hover:bg-white transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl

navigation.header: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-stone-200/50 h-20 flex items-center transition-all duration-300
navigation.link: font-heading font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-stone-800 hover:text-petrol-green transition-colors relative after:content-[''] after:absolute after:bottom-[-4px] after:left-0 after:w-0 after:h-[2px] after:bg-petrol-gold after:transition-all after:duration-300 hover:after:w-full

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lenis' for smooth scrolling immediately. This is non-negotiable for the 'premium' feel.
2. FONT: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css or index.html immediately.
3. TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'colors' and 'fontFamily' extensions provided above.
4. LAYOUT: Build the Hero section first. It must be 100vh, using the images in a carousel with a slow zoom (Ken Burns) effect.
5. COMPONENT: Create a 'ServiceCard' component that uses 'react-tilt' or framer-motion for a 3D hover effect.
6. GLOBAL: Add a subtle noise texture overlay to the entire body using 'pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[9999] opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay'.
7. BILINGUAL: Prepare the structure for i18n, but for now, just hardcode Spanish text with English placeholders or toggles if requested.
8. SHADCN: Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (Forms, Dialogs) but strip their default styling to match the 'Industrial Luxury' aesthetic.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for the primary background. Use the 'industrial-white' solid color.
Never center text in the Hero section unless it is a massive headline. Left-align for strength.
Use uppercase tracking-widest labels above headlines (e.g., 'OUR SERVICES' above 'MARINE LOGISTICS').
Ensure all images have a dark overlay (bg-black/40) when text is placed on top of them.
